docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-13-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER MIKHAIL LUNSKIY. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET GROUP OWNER OF PV HOLDING COMPANY
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF RATNER, BORIS
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO MICHAEL LARSON ON 12/05/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PETITION FOR WRIT FILED BY PETITIONER RATNER, BORIS AS TO RESPONDENT LARSON, MICHAEL
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SC-108 ANSWER FORM MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12/20/2018. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RATNER, BORIS AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RATNER, BORIS AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, MICHAEL
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RATNER, BORIS AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, MICHAEL AVIS BUDGET GROUP OWNER OF PV HOLDING COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF BORIS RATNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL LARSON IS NOT PRESENT. TRUE OWNER OF VEHICLE IS PRESENT: AVIS BUDGET OWNER OF P.V. HOLDING COMPANY, SHELLY CRUZ, INSURANCE INVESTIGATOR. SERVICE WAIVED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER DENYING PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RATNER, BORIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LARSON, MICHAEL AVIS BUDGET GROUP OWNER OF PV HOLDING COMPANY PLAINTIFF BEARS THE BURDEN OF PROOF. IN HIS CASE I HAVE CONFLICTING SWORN TESTIMONY ON BOTH SIDES. I FIND THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED HIS BURDEN. THE RECORDED STATEMENT DOES NOT ESTABLISH THAT LARSON WAS AT FAULT. AVIS BUDGET GROUP IS ADDED AS A DEFENDANT PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' STIPULATION. THE COURT DISMISSES THE ACTION AGAINST LARSON WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR LACK OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: COY OF SC-108A ORDER MAILED 12/31/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
